method: max-affine structured value-function surrogate with value-register comparator simulation

oracle_decomposition.max_register: reversible comparator tree computes max_r L_r(x)
oracle_decomposition.threshold_comparator: mark if feasible(x) and max-affine value <= tau_register
oracle_decomposition.uncompute: reverse max, affine pieces, features, and feasibility after phase marking
